blessed_e2e_ids.name: Core review happy path
blessed_e2e_ids.notes: CLI launch, blessed provider path, findings normalization, local approval, GitHub adapter double, audit persistence

blessed_e2e_ids.name: Cross-surface review continuity with recall
blessed_e2e_ids.notes: Supported browser or bridge entry, continuity across dropout or resume, TUI triage, local draft persistence, and explicit memory truth assertions for retrieval mode, scope, provenance, and degraded lexical-only fallback.

blessed_e2e_ids.name: TUI-first review with memory-assisted triage
blessed_e2e_ids.notes: Local CLI or TUI entry, findings and history inspection, prior-review recall during triage, outbound draft refinement, and explicit memory truth assertions for mode, scope, provenance, and degraded fallback.

blessed_e2e_ids.name: Refresh and draft reconciliation after new commits
blessed_e2e_ids.notes: Active review with pending drafts, refresh after new commits or rebase, finding reconciliation, draft revalidation or reconfirmation, and preserved audit lineage across target change.

blessed_e2e_ids.name: Browser setup and first PR-page launch
blessed_e2e_ids.notes: Guided setup, extension identity discovery without manual entry, Native Messaging host registration, truthful doctor result, and first PR-page launch into the correct local Roger session.

blessed_e2e_ids.name: Bare-harness dropout and return continuity
blessed_e2e_ids.notes: Intentional dropout from Roger to a supported harness, preserved control context, return through rr or harness-native affordance, and continuity back into the same Roger session.
